items.title: LPL 2026 from July 10 to August 5
items.summary: The sixth edition will feature the recently renovated SSC in Colombo as an LPL venue for the first time
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Cardinals vs. Marlins prediction, odds, time: 2026 MLB picks for Wednesday, April 22 from proven model
items.summary: SportsLine's model simulated the Miami Marlins vs. St. Louis Cardinals 10,000 times and revealed its MLB picks for Wednesday's matchup
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 'Turning football into rubble': Chaos reigns as VAR intervenes over goal scored during substitution
items.summary: In what is possibly a world-first, VAR overturned a goal over a substitution -- and it led to a controversial Asian Champions League semifinal exit.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
